calendar.description: Senate Judiciary, Law Enforcement, and Criminal Justice Hearing
Senate Judiciary, Law Enforcement, and Criminal Justice Hearing
Senate Judiciary, Law Enforcement, and Criminal Justice Hearing

general_provisions: This bill amends the Insurance Code to establish requirements relating to policy-limit demands and disclosures in third-party liability claims related to motor vehicle liability.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>establishes requirements for the content of policy-limit demand letters from a claimant to a liability insurance carrier;<hr><ltbullet>establishes requirements for correspondence from a claimant or a claimant's legal counsel to an unrepresented insured;<hr><ltbullet>requires a liability insurance carrier to provide written disclosure to the insured regarding defense and indemnification;<hr><ltbullet>addresses the effect of a disclosure and the consequences of noncompliance; and<hr><ltbullet>preserves existing rights and remedies.
